The '''''Relentless''''' was a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. It was one of four ships that formed the core forces of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vanko]]'s personal fleet.

[[Jak Durasha]], [[Celia Durasha]]'s brother was stationed aboard the ''Relentless'' in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|8|A Certain Point of View (short story)|reprint=1}} {{Mo}}
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}}
